stimulus: Whether sculptor Ruth Asawa is creating small wire sculptures or large public installations—such as the wire-mesh fountain in San Francisco’s Ghirardelli Square—she is ______blank personal experience, drawing on memories of crafting baskets as a child in California.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice A is correct because "guided by" means using something as a source of direction, fitting the idea that Asawa drew on memories of her childhood. Choice B is incorrect because the text doesn’t suggest she was confused. Choice C is incorrect because she actively uses these memories. Choice D is incorrect because nothing suggests displeasure.
